zh.Harpenden, Hertfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾哈朋登
英國英格蘭爾斯托雷頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Amabilis De Sylvester於大約1170年出生在英國爾斯托雷頓時，她的父親Ranulph FitzAlan de Sylvester, of the Wirral27歲，母親Mrs Randle de Sylvester27歲。她於大約1142年與Alexander de Sylvester在英國英格蘭爾斯托雷頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1230年在她的家鄉享年61歲。

zh-hans.Harpenden, Hertfordshire, England: 英国英格兰賀特福爾哈朋登
英国英格兰爾斯托雷頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amabilis De Sylvester于大约1170年出生在英国爾斯托雷頓时，她的父亲Ranulph FitzAlan de Sylvester, of the Wirral27岁，母亲Mrs Randle de Sylvester27岁。她于大约1142年与Alexander de Sylvester在英国英格兰爾斯托雷頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1230年在她的家乡享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sylvester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and German: from the Middle English and Latin personal name Silvester ‘dweller in the forest’ (a derivative of silva ‘wood’). The name was borne by three popes, including a contemporary of Constantine the Great, and seems to have been first used in England by clerics.

variants.name: Silvestre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Fernando, Juan, Miguel, Carlos, Ramon, Raul, Efren, Josefina, Mario, Pedro.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim.
Galician and Spanish: habitational name from any of the places called Silvestre in Pontevedra and Badajoz.
Catalan, French (Occitan), and Spanish: from the personal name Silvestre (see Sylvester ).

variants.name: Selwyn
meanings: English (Gloucestershire):
from the Middle English personal name Selewin(e) (Old English Selewine, perhaps from sele ‘hall’ or sǣl ‘happiness, prosperity’ + wine ‘friend’).

of Norman origin, perhaps from the Middle English and Old French personal name Selvein, Silvein (from Latin Silvanus, an adjective from silva ‘woodland’), with vocalization of /v/ to /w/, possibly through influence of the name above. In Anglo-Norman usage both Selvein and Silvester were sometimes Latinized as Salvagius ‘wild, savage’ (see Sylvester and Savage ), though whether the vernacular surnames were ever interchangeable is a question for further research.

variants.name: West
meanings: English and German: from Middle English, Middle High German west ‘west’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived to the west of a settlement, or a habitational name for someone who had migrated from further west.
Americanized form of Finnish Vesterinen: from the personal name Vesteri (a short form of Sylvester ) + the surname suffix -nen.

History: This name was brought to North America independently by many bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. Thomas West, 12th Baron De La Warre, was captain general of Virginia in 1610–11. The state of DE is named for him. One of the earliest permanent settlers was Francis West (1606–92), who came to Duxbury, MA, from Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, in or before 1638.

variants.name: Sylvestre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Normand, Pierre, Adelard, Aime, Alphonse, Carmelle, Donat, Gilles, Jean Claude, Marcel.
French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the French personal name Sylvestre (see Sylvester ).
History: Nicolas Sylvestre dit Champagne from Pont-sur-Seine in Aube, France, married Barbe Neveu in Quebec City, QC, in 1667.

variants.name: Sule
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Aparna, Dileep, Geeta, Harsh, Pushkar, Sangeeta, Vikram.  Hungarian Mihaly, Sandor.
Indian (Maharashtra; pronounced as two syllables): Maratha name, from Marathi suḷa ‘pointed tooth’, from Sanskrit šūla ‘spike, spear’.
Hungarian: from a pet form of the personal name Szilveszter (see Sylvester ).

variants.name: Silvester
meanings: English and German: variant of   Sylvester  .

variants.name: Silvestro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenic, Angelo, Sal, Caesar, Agostino, Antonio, Camillo, Carmelo, Dino, Ennio, Gaetano, Giovanni.
Italian: from the personal name Silvestro, Latin Silvester (see Sylvester ).

variants.name: Sylvest
meanings: Danish: from a personal name, a shortened form of Latin Silvester (see Sylvester ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Amabilis De Sylvester was born about 1170, in Storeton, Cheshire, England, her father, Ranulph FitzAlan de Sylvester, of the Wirral, was 27 and her mother, Mrs Randle de Sylvester, was 27. She married Alexander de Sylvester about 1142, in Storeton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1230, in her hometown, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amabilis De Sylvester est née environ 1170, à Storeton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Ranulph FitzAlan de Sylvester, of the Wirral, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs Randle de Sylvester, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander de Sylvester environ 1142, à Storeton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1230, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amabilis De Sylvester um 1170 in Storeton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ranulph FitzAlan de Sylvester, of the Wirral 27 und ihre Mutter Mrs Randle de Sylvester 27. Sie hat um 1142 in Storeton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Alexander de Sylvester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1230 im Alter von 61 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Amabilis De Sylvester è nata il circa 1170 nel Storeton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Ranulph FitzAlan de Sylvester, of the Wirral, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Mrs Randle de Sylvester, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Alexander de Sylvester circa 1142, nel Storeton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1230, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amabilis De Sylvesterが約1170年にイギリスチェシュアイアストーレトンで生まれた時，父Ranulph FitzAlan de Sylvester, of the Wirralは27歳，母Mrs Randle de Sylvesterは27歳であった。約1142年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストーレトンでAlexander de Sylvesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1230年に故郷で61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amabilis De Sylvester(이)가 대략 1170년 영국 체실르 스토레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ranulph FitzAlan de Sylvester, of the Wirral(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Randle de Sylvester(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1142년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스토레턴에서 Alexander de Sylvester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1230년 그녀의 고향에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amabilis De Sylvester nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ranulph FitzAlan de Sylvester, of the Wirral, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Randle de Sylvester, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander de Sylvester aproximadamente 1142, em Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1230, em sua cidade natal, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amabilis De Sylvester родилась около 1170 г. в местности сторетон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ranulph FitzAlan de Sylvester, of the Wirral было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Randle de Sylvester, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander de Sylvester около 1142 г. в местности сторетон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1230 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Amabilis De Sylvester nació aproximadamente 1170, en Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ranulph FitzAlan de Sylvester, of the Wirral, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs Randle de Sylvester, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Alexander de Sylvester aproximadamente 1142, en Storeton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1230, en su pueblo, a la edad de 61 años.
